summary: The provided literature does not identify specific causative links between exon 38 or 39 KMT2D missense variants and Kabuki syndrome type 1 despite known associations of other KMT2D mutations with the condition. Thus, based on available evidence, such variants are not confirmed to be pathogenic causes of KS1.
